criteria.criterion: `_attach_code_review_metrics` adds `input_tokens`, `output_tokens`, `cache_read_tokens`, `cache_write_tokens`, and `total_tokens` to `coverage["metrics"]`, summed across all `_usage`-bearing succeeded steps; verified by the finalize unit test asserting exact sums.
A step record with no `_usage` contributes 0 and never raises; verified by the tolerance unit test.

`voter._publish_token_usage_metrics` emits exactly the five `review_bot_llm_*_tokens` metrics to `Namespace="rebar/host"` with `Unit="Count"` and values from the passed metrics dict; verified by the fake-boto3 unit test capturing `put_metric_data`.
`_publish_token_usage_metrics` swallows a boto3 import/credential/network failure without raising; verified by the boto3-absence unit test.
`review_and_vote` calls the token publisher after a successful vote using `decision["verdict"]["coverage"]["metrics"]`; verified by the voter harness test (or an equivalent direct assertion).
